thinking.text: annotation.xml references $metadata remotely, combining with a local stub; an empty local schema remains valid. Adding the TimeEntry navigation route to the manifest with a pattern matching SAP's composite key structure, using placeholders for key segments to encode full key strings internally. The route pattern follows SAP's generated format with placeholders {key}, {key2}, {key3} for Project, Task, and TimeEntry respectively, enabling proper navigation within the OData V4 key pattern.

{"contents":"# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/schema/ui5.yaml.json

specVersion: "4.0"
metadata:
  name: com.demo.migration.projects.fe
type: application
framework:
  name: SAPUI5
  version: 1.147.0
  libraries:
    - name: sap.m
    - name: sap.ui.core
    - name: sap.fe.templates
    - name: sap.ushell
    - name: themelib_sap_horizon
server:
  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-appreload
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        port: 35729
        path: webapp
        delay: 300
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-middleware
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
        excludePatterns:
          - /Component-preload.js
    - name: fiori-tools-preview
      afterMiddleware: fiori-tools-appreload
      configuration:
        flp:
          theme: sap_horizon
          path: test/flpSandbox.html
          intent:
            object: comdemomigrationprojectsfe
            action: tile
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertErrors: true # If set to true, certificate errors will be ignored. E.g. self-signed certificates will be accepted
        backend:
          - path: /sap
            url: https://example-s4hana.local:50001
    - name: sap-fe-mockserver
      beforeMiddleware: csp
      configuration:
        mountPath: /
        services:
          - urlPath: /sap/opu/odata4/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/srvd/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/0001
            metadataPath: ./webapp/localService/mainService/metadata.xml
            mockdataPath: ./webapp/localService/mainService/data
            generateMockData: true
        annotations: []
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
","totalLinesInFile":66}

{"contents":"# RUN-NOTES (demo workspace)

Incremental learnings from UI5 modernization runs. Append-only sections per run.

---

## Run N — freestyle JS → TS (modern-ui5-ts-app, May 2026)

**Symptom:** `eslint webapp --fix` failed after `tsconfig.json` excluded `webapp/test/**` (tests skipped from `ts-typecheck`).

**Root cause:** `typescript-eslint` `parserOptions.project` points at `tsconfig.json`; files under `webapp/test` are no longer in the TS program, so ESLint errors with “TSConfig does not include this file”.

**Fix:** Add `webapp/test/**` to `eslint.config.mjs` `ignores` (or re-include tests in `tsconfig.json` if you want typechecked tests).

**Generic rule (proposed Self-help Pattern H):** Whenever you narrow `tsconfig` `include`/`exclude` for faster `tsc`, mirror the same exclusion in ESLint `ignores` so `npx eslint webapp` stays aligned with the TS program graph.

**SRVB URL discovery:** `SAPRead(type="SRVB", name="ZUI_DM_PROJECTS_O4")` returns binding metadata (OData V4, service definition `ZUI_DM_PROJECTS`, version `0001`) but not the HTTP path; the SRVD-direct path is confirmed by `skills/migrate-segw-to-rap.md` and matches `/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/srvd/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/0001/`.

**Action FQN:** From the same skill’s curl example: `com.sap.gateway.srvd.zui_dm_projects.v0001.approve_project` (note: service id in the namespace is `zui_dm_projects`, not `zui_dm_projects_o4`).

**UI5 manifest v2:** `routing.config.async` is rejected by `ui5-linter` (`no-removed-manifest-property`); remove it for manifest `_version` `2.0.0`.

**Proxy baseUri:** Legacy `ui5.yaml` uses `http://…:50000/sap`; modern HTTPS trial uses `https://…:50001/sap` with `strictSSL: false` and `query.sap-client: "001"`.

**Browser note:** `Claude_in_Chrome` was not available in this workspace’s MCP set; layout verification used `cursor-ide-browser` (FCL “First column” + “Middle column” regions; resizable divider). Empty list with “No projects found.” without `.env` proxy credentials is expected until `UI5_MIDDLEWARE_SIMPLE_PROXY_*` is set.

{"contents":"# RUN-NOTES (demo workspace)

Incremental learnings from UI5 modernization runs. Append-only sections per run.

---

## Run N — freestyle JS → TS (modern-ui5-ts-app, May 2026)

**Symptom:** `eslint webapp --fix` failed after `tsconfig.json` excluded `webapp/test/**` (tests skipped from `ts-typecheck`).

**Root cause:** `typescript-eslint` `parserOptions.project` points at `tsconfig.json`; files under `webapp/test` are no longer in the TS program, so ESLint errors with “TSConfig does not include this file”.

**Fix:** Add `webapp/test/**` to `eslint.config.mjs` `ignores` (or re-include tests in `tsconfig.json` if you want typechecked tests).

**Generic rule (proposed Self-help Pattern H):** Whenever you narrow `tsconfig` `include`/`exclude` for faster `tsc`, mirror the same exclusion in ESLint `ignores` so `npx eslint webapp` stays aligned with the TS program graph.

**SRVB URL discovery:** `SAPRead(type="SRVB", name="ZUI_DM_PROJECTS_O4")` returns binding metadata (OData V4, service definition `ZUI_DM_PROJECTS`, version `0001`) but not the HTTP path; the SRVD-direct path is confirmed by `skills/migrate-segw-to-rap.md` and matches `/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/srvd/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/0001/`.

**Action FQN:** From the same skill’s curl example: `com.sap.gateway.srvd.zui_dm_projects.v0001.approve_project` (note: service id in the namespace is `zui_dm_projects`, not `zui_dm_projects_o4`).

**UI5 manifest v2:** `routing.config.async` is rejected by `ui5-linter` (`no-removed-manifest-property`); remove it for manifest `_version` `2.0.0`.

**Proxy baseUri:** Legacy `ui5.yaml` uses `http://…:50000/sap`; modern HTTPS trial uses `https://…:50001/sap` with `strictSSL: false` and `query.sap-client: "001"`.

**Browser note:** `Claude_in_Chrome` was not available in this workspace’s MCP set; layout verification used `cursor-ide-browser` (FCL “First column” + “Middle column” regions; resizable divider). Empty list with “No projects found.” without `.env` proxy credentials is expected until `UI5_MIDDLEWARE_SIMPLE_PROXY_*` is set.

---

## Run N+1 — Fiori Elements LROP (`modern-fe-app/dm-projects-fe`, May 2026)

**Fiori MCP:** `execute_functionality` / `fetch-service-metadata` returned MCP **‑32600** (structured server error); fallback **@sap-ux/fiori-elements-writer** `generate()` from `modern-fe-app/dm-projects-fe/scripts/write-fe.mjs` (call `generate(basePath, config)` only—do not pass a custom **mem-fs** editor as `fs`).

**ABAP CDS UI (7.58):** **`@UI.headerInfo`**: use **`type: #STANDARD`** with **`value: 'FieldName'`** (quoted path); **`#FIELD`** / unquoted paths caused activation issues in this stack. **`@Search.defaultSearchElement`** belongs on **non-key** searchable fields only (key fields triggered activation errors). Split heavy **`@Search`** from DDLX metadata extensions into **ZC\_DM\_\*** DDLS where needed.

**DDLX `@UI.identification` FOR_ACTION:** **`criticality`** was rejected (**int** and **string**); left **`criticalityRepresentation: #WITH_ICON`** without **`criticality`** for **approve_project**.

**Local stub:** `webapp/localService/mainService/metadata.xml` is minimal hand-built OData V4 EDM for generator/offline sanity; **`scripts/validate-metadata.mjs`** uses `@sap-ux/edmx-parser`. Navigation property names (**`_TimeEntries`**) must match live **`$metadata`**—if the browser breaks at runtime, realign **`manifest.json`** navigation keys with OData.

**Manifest `_version`:** Bumping **`_version`** to **`2.0.0`** broke **`run_manifest_validation`** (for example **`odataVersion`**, **`customType`**); app stays at **`1.85.0`** until those align with tooling.

**Dev server sanity:** **`npm run start-local`** (**`fiori run --config ./ui5-local.yaml`**) served on **`http://localhost:8083`**; **`curl`** returned **HTTP 200** for **`/test/flpSandbox.html?...#demodmprojectsfe`** and for proxied **`$metadata`**. Logs may show **`backend-proxy-middleware`** “No credential” for **`fiori/v2/system`**, **`manifestEnhancer`** i18n fallback warnings, and **`ushell` versionInfoGenerator** dependency notes—these largely match generator/template defaults.

**Approve action FQN reminder:** **`com.sap.gateway.srvd.zui_dm_projects.v0001.approve_project`** (**`zui_dm_projects`**, not **`zui_dm_projects_o4`**).

---

**Approve action FQN reminder:** **`com.sap.gateway.srvd.zui_dm_projects.v0001.approve_project`** (**`zui_dm_projects`**, not **`zui_dm_projects_o4`**).

---

**Fiori MCP:** `execute_functionality` / `fetch-service-metadata` returned MCP **‑32600** (structured server error); fallback **@sap‑ux/fiori‑elements‑writer** `generate()` from `modern-fe-app/dm-projects-fe/scripts/write-fe.mjs` (do not pass a custom **mem-fs** instance into `generate`; use `generate(basePath, config)` only).

data.text:
Here is where things stand after your **ok** on the guided conversion.

### Run summary

| Topic | Result |
|--------|--------|
| **Backend** | OData V4 SRVB **`ZUI_DM_PROJECTS_O4`** published; CDS UI split (**ZC\_DM\_\*** DDLS + **ZME\_DM\_\*** DDLX), **`approve_project`** exposed via **`@UI.identification`**, **`criticality`** dropped (activation); **`@Search.defaultSearchElement`** on non-keys only |
| **FE scaffold** | **`modern-fe-app/dm-projects-fe/`** from **`@sap-ux/fiori-elements-writer`** (MCP **`execute_functionality`** fallback after **‑32600**) |
| **Service binding** | Manifest **`mainService`** → `/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/srvd/sap/zui_dm_projects_o4/0001/`, OData **4.01**; **`annotation.xml`** local + live **`$metadata`** |
| **Dev server / FLP** | **`npm run start-local`** → **`http://localhost:8083`**; **`curl`** **200** on FLP sandbox and proxied **`$metadata`** |
| **3-level routing** | **`Project({key})` → `Task({key2})` → `TimeEntry({key3})`**; **`TaskObjectPage`** uses navigation **`"_TimeEntries"`** → **`TimeEntryObjectPage`** |
| **Manifest tooling** | Stays **`_version` `1.85.0`** ( **`2.0.0`** tripped **`run_manifest_validation`** ) |
| **Limitations / follow-up** | **Browser UX** (LR columns, OP facets/header, deep link to time entries, **Approve** round-trip) not re-run here; **`BDEF` approve precheck** (e.g. only **Status = D**) optional; **`localService` EDM** is a stub—if runtime errors appear, compare nav names to live **`$metadata`** |

### Run-notes

Rough edges and CDS/UI5 quirks are consolidated in **`RUN-NOTES.md`** (duplicate sections from earlier partial edits were removed so there is a single **Run N+1** block).

### Note on the dev server

The **`fiori run`** process was stopped after **`curl`** checks. To work in the browser again:

```bash
cd modern-fe-app/dm-projects-fe && npm run start-local
```

Open **`http://localhost:8083/test/flpSandbox.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#demodmprojectsfe`** (use the URL/port from your terminal if they differ).

If you want next, we can walk through **Approve** interaction and **`_TimeEntries`** navigation in **`cursor-ide-browser`** step by step.
